/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/yolo_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolo_server.dir/src/OnnxYoloInfr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolo_server.dir/src/MainReactor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolo_server.dir/src/FdThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolo_server.dir/src/ThreadDecoder.cpp.o -o yolo_server   -L/home/zzm/anaconda3/envs/lymc/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zzm/anaconda3/envs/lymc/lib:/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.14.0 -lonnxruntime -lavformat -lavcodec -lavutil -lswscale -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.14.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.14.0
